arts.ttl: ‘Lost his pace’: Pundit says £50m Arsenal player looks so much slower than he used to
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling is struggling at Arsenal, it has to be said. Indeed, despite scoring 123 Premier League goals in his career so far, Raheem Sterling...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola names four Champions League title contenders as Mikel Arteta sent Arsenal message
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has named the four clubs he thinks have the mettle to win the Champions League, following Manchester City's elimination at the hands of Real Madrid. City's back-to-back defeats to Real Madrid – now three times in four years – have been a notable pattern in the knockouts, with Guardiola conceding that this time around, the better team won.

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins sends subtle message after handing Arsenal huge Premier League title boost
arts.sum: Marcos Asensio and Marcus Rashford joining Villa on loan in the final days of the winter window offered Arsenal some Watkins hope, but the decision had seemingly already been made. Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins could have helped boyhood club Arsenal in their Premier League title race against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta could consider four Arsenal changes vs West Ham with new-look defence
arts.sum: The right-back returned to the matchday squad against Leicester at the weekend and the game against West Ham could be perfect for him to return to the starting XI. The Hammers make the short trip across the capital on Saturday afternoon, with Mikel Arteta's men now unbeaten in their last 15 league games.

arts.ttl: Early West Ham team news v Arsenal: Potter rules 3 players out
arts.sum: Graham Potter has confirmed that West Ham United will be without three players in their squad to take on Arsenal. West Ham travel to the... The post Early West Ham team news v Arsenal: Potter rules 3 players out appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's dream and nightmare routes to Champions League final ahead of last-16 draw
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal are preparing to discover their opponents in the Champions League round of 16 and Gunners fans will have an idea of who they want to avoid
